features.name: fork-join_none with blocking statements immediately after join_none
features.description: Code should include a fork-join_none block followed immediately by blocking statements in the parent process, where those blocking statements should execute before any spawned process starts

features.name: fork-join_none with single blocking statement inside fork
features.description: Code should include a fork-join_none block containing a single blocking statement that should not execute until the parent process blocks
